$comment: Shared notification-kind vocabulary fixture (PR-6 FE regression guards). Single source both sides assert against: backend models/notification.py::NOTIFICATION_KIND_VALUES (Postgres enum notification_kind, migration 0030 added approval_state_changed — H-5) and the frontend mirror features/notifications/api/notificationsApi.ts::NOTIFICATION_KINDS. The FE assertion lives in apps/frontend/tests/unit/contracts/catalogMirrors.test.ts; wiring the backend test to this same file is a tracked follow-up. Order matters: it mirrors the enum declaration order.
